governing_requirement: The Main-owned MaskFactoryAdapter must use only adopted, versioned, hash-bound producer contracts and published service/package capabilities; durable orchestration must not import MaskFactory internal modules, depend on ComfyUI node IDs, read arbitrary mutable paths, or treat thin nodes as the controller.

ownership_boundary.MaskFactory: Publish frozen wire contracts, release/capability/OpenAPI identities, immutable packages, localhost service behavior, compatibility fixtures, and producer conformance evidence.
ownership_boundary.Comfy_UI_Main: Implement and operate MaskFactoryAdapter, controller/DAG binding, retries, arbitration, cache, recovery, and consumer acceptance.
ownership_boundary.prohibited: MaskFactory must not implement Main orchestration or credit its thin ComfyUI nodes as the external adapter.

prerequisites: MF-P6-10.05 has no accepted live adoption conformance decision.
MF-P6-10.01 through MF-P6-10.04 have no accepted immutable production release/capability/install chain.
Main has not supplied a production adapter package and signed conformance result against the current producer release.
verified_foundations: Twelve frozen v1 JSON contracts include acquisition request/receipt, release, capability, requirements, adoption, errors, invalidation, feedback, certificate, semantic profile, and lifecycle event records.
The MaskFactory FastAPI service is loopback-only and its current health/models/predict/refine surface is live under the pinned environment.
Raw predict responses are draft-only and the serving runtime resolves governed champion roles rather than allowing an arbitrary provider role.
The copied ComfyUI node module is dependency-light and its AST contains no package write operations; deliberate workflow output under the package truth root is rejected.
The node pack can be installed without importing the MaskFactory Python package, showing a useful thin execution/UI boundary.

commands: python -m ruff check src/maskfactory/serve/api.py src/maskfactory/serve/comfy_export.py src/maskfactory/serve/comfy_install.py tests/test_serve_api.py tests/test_comfy_export.py

confirmed_gaps: No MaskFactoryAdapter class or external adapter package exists in this producer repository, as expected for a Main-owned runtime.
No producer conformance verifier proves that Main imports only its pinned adapter and frozen wire models rather than MaskFactory internals.
The live OpenAPI has no versioned mask_acquisition_request/mask_acquisition_receipt exchange endpoint and does not expose adopted release/capability/schema/journal identities per request.

The thin Mode A node pack reads a configured filesystem packages_root and filters a human_approved_gold status; it does not validate the frozen request/receipt exchange, release adoption, exact operational wrapper, revocation head, or cache identity.

The thin Mode B node posts multipart image/labels directly to /predict with a 120-second timeout; it does not carry the frozen identity tuple, authenticated consumer identity, idempotency, deadline/resource envelope, transforms, protected inputs, intended-use authority, or signed receipt.
No test rejects Main adapter imports of maskfactory internal modules, direct dirty-worktree paths, ComfyUI node-class IDs, or unversioned endpoint assumptions.
No exact Main adapter commit/package/API/ontology/node/champion/rollback identity has passed producer-side compatibility fixtures against an adopted release.

implementation_packet.objective: Implement an additive producer-side adapter conformance verifier and evidence format that evaluates the pinned Main adapter against adopted frozen contracts and published producer capabilities without implementing Main orchestration or changing frozen v1.
implementation_packet.path_state: All five allowed paths are absent and clean. Candidate paths are read-only. The scope is disjoint from frozen v1 contracts, preserved MF-P6-08.05 dirty paths, and prepared MF-P6-09/10/11.01 predecessor units.
acceptance_criteria: Consume an exact accepted producer release/capability/adoption chain plus a pinned Main adapter package/commit and closed byte inventory; editable, dirty, untracked, path-only, or unpinned inputs fail.
Statically and dynamically reject adapter imports from MaskFactory internal modules, direct MaskFactory repository paths, ComfyUI node-class IDs, mutable package roots, and undeclared endpoints.

Require every adapter exchange to serialize/validate the frozen request, receipt, error, certificate, invalidation, feedback, and lifecycle contracts at their exact schema hashes and supported versions.
Verify Mode A and Mode B use only published package/API capabilities, preserve identities and hashes exactly, keep raw Mode B draft-only, and independently recompute intended-use eligibility.

Exercise single- and multi-person fixtures, unknown/incompatible versions, malformed/extra/missing fields, direct internal coupling, dirty installs, stale release/capability/revocation heads, transport outage, and no-silent-fallback behavior.
Record exact producer and Main Git/package/API/OpenAPI/schema/ontology/node/champion/rollback hashes, test outputs, and deterministic verdict in a strict self-hashed evidence document.
The conformance tool performs no consumer writes, does not sign Main records, and cannot grant release, adoption, operational-certificate, or end-to-end authority.
Frozen v1 schemas/fixtures, held worker records, and preserved dirty paths remain byte-identical.

claim_boundary: This audit proves loopback service, draft-only runtime, dependency-light read-only nodes, and frozen contract foundations only. It does not implement Main's MaskFactoryAdapter, publish an adopted producer release, prove contract-based Mode A/Mode B orchestration, or complete MF-P6-11.01.
